microsoft_ft: Owned the **technical narrative** end-to-end for Azure resilience validation, running discovery and architecture deep-dives with enterprise engineering leaders (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp) to scope success criteria and drive **$14M+ business impact** across 45+ annual drills.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, scoping and executing a rack-level **proof-of-concept** in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous validation.

Directed 14 cross-org technical executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation POC that translated complex infrastructure risk into a clear close on a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.

Built an internal **AI agent** with custom prompts and restructured planning workflows using modern LLM tooling, **cutting planning cycle time 39%** and increasing drill capacity 21% while creating reusable playbooks to scale the broader validation function.

Partnered cross-functionally with Product, Engineering, Customer Success, and Support to remove deal blockers, feeding customer signal back into roadmap and positioning so the platform mirrored what enterprise buyers actually needed to **adopt at scale**.
